goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'express by holiday inn cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'parkside pools'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
